caption: A group of men, mostly dressed in white traditional Indian attire, stand outdoors in front of a white vehicle and a building. The central figure is a man in a white kurta who is speaking and gesturing. He is surrounded by several other men, some in white and others in casual dark shirts. The scene is a news broadcast, featuring various on-screen elements. A yellow banner at the bottom repeatedly reads "निर्दलीय MLA सुमित कुमार सिंह मंत्री बने", while a red banner at the top of the first two frames asks "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". Small inset portraits of several men appear on the sides, with names like "सप्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "बिजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार" listed. The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the top right. As the sequence progresses, the top red banner changes to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी का". The overall scene remains static with the group of men standing together.
